Strategic Front-End 	Product Creation:
What Are The Objectives
When Creating Your 	!
Front-End Product?
Module 2 - Lesson 2

-- 1 of 3 --

Front-End Product Objectives:!
• Fulfill on all product hook & promise!
• Over-deliver value with stellar content!
• Exceed new customer expectations!
• Provide a stellar buying experience!
• Provide a stellar consumption experience!
• Demonstrate your expertise/positioning!
• Set-up the sale for your first backend offer
Module 2 - Lesson 2
Strategic Front-End 	Product Creation:

-- 2 of 3 --

Setting-Up The Backend Sale (Pre-Selling): 	!
• Nonchalant comments!
• Alluding to backend product!
• Referencing information provided in backend product!
• Referencing client/customer results from backend product!
• Useful, but incomplete 	extra 	information
Module 2 - Lesson 2
Strategic Front-End 	Product Creation:

-- 3 of 3 --
